text:
Extremity Motion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's level of lower extremity limitation (hip, knee, ankle, foot). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No impairment
1=Impairment on one side
2=Impairment on both sides discontinued 09/30/2023
247 G0600A_CANE_CD G0600A_CANE_CD G0600A Mobility Devices: Cane Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident normally utilizes a cane/crutch. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
